name: roi-insights
description: ROI Insights WordPress Plugin — admin UI build

scripts.plugin-zip: npm run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/roi-insights && cp -r roi-insights.php readme.txt LICENSE includes build assets dist/roi-insights/ && cd dist && zip -r ../roi-insights.zip roi-insights && cd .. && rm -rf dist && echo '✓ roi-insights.zip ready for upload'
